creator: yusufg@outblaze.com
text:
Hi, The following 2 documents
a) PXE installs => http://people.freebsd.org/~alfred/pxe
b) Filtered bridging => http://people.freebsd.org/~nsayer/bdg-ipfw.txt

have been very useful to me. I request that they be incorporated into the 
handbook to publicise them to a wider audience

Regards, Yusuf

How-To-Repeat: N/A
